(prep.) on, upon, on top of, above, over (place, rank); at, on, by; in, in the state of, in the manner of, in possession of; to, toward, for; in addition to; to the debit of, to the disadvantage of; against, in spite of, despite; on the basis of, on the strength of, by virtue of, due to. upon; by, through; according to. in accordance with, pursuant to; to (one’s taste, one’s mind, one’s liking, etc.); during; (as to syntactical regimen see under respective verb) ; على‎ من‎ from above from upon ..., from the top of …; ان‎ على‎ (an, anna) on the condition that …, provided that ...; although, though, albeit;ان‎ على‎ (anna) (introducing a main clause) however, but, on the other hand, nevertheless, yet, still, ... though; انه‎ على‎ (in the subjective notion or view that …, i. e.) as, e. g.: الالھة‎ نعمة‎ انھا‎ على‎ الأرض‎ ثمرات‎ جنى‎ janā ṯamarāti l-arḍi ‘alā annahā ni‘matu l-āliha he reaped the fruits of the earth (accepting them) as a boon bestowed by the grace of the gods; الخيل‎ ظھر‎ على‎ (ẓahr l-ḵail) on horseback;الباخرة‎ ظھر‎ على‎ aboard the steamer; عليكم‎ السلام‎ (salāmu) may peace be upon you ; والعين‎ الرأس‎ على‎ ‘alā r-ra’s wa-l-‘ain very gladly! with pleasure! الاشھاد‎ رؤوس‎ على‎ publicly, for everyone to see; النار‎ على‎ جلس‎ he was sitting by the fire; يمينه‎ على‎ (yamīnihī) to (at) his right;حال‎ كل‎ على‎ (kulli) or كل‎ على‎ (kullin) in any case, at any rate; على‎ الخصوص‎ especially, particularly, specifically; الاطلاق‎ على‎ (iṭlāq) absolutely, unrestrictedly, without exception, in any respect, under any circumstances;على‎ التقريب‎ approximately, almost, nearly, about, circa; التوالي‎ على‎ (tawālī) continuously, incessantly, in uninterrupted succession; ضوء‎ على‎ (ḍau’i) or نور‎ على‎ (nūri) in the light of ...; حق‎ على‎ كان‎ (ḥaqqin) or الحق‎ على‎ كان‎ to be on the right way, have hit on the right thing, be right; الباطل‎ على‎ كان‎ or خطأ‎ على‎ كان‎ (ḵaṭa’in) to be on the wrong way, be wrong, be mistaken;يرام‎ ما‎ أحسن‎ على‎ ھو‎ (aḥsani, yurām) he is as well as you can possibly wish (for him);من‎ شيء‎ على‎ ھو‎ ... he has certain ...; الذكاء‎ من‎ شيء‎ على‎ ھو‎ (ḏakā’) he has a good deal of intelligence;شيء‎ على‎ ھذا‎ ليس‎ there is nothing in it, it’s worthless; كله‎ ھذا‎ من‎ ليس‎ شيء‎ على‎ all this is unfamiliar to him; he doesn’t understand a thing about it; المسيح‎ دين‎ على‎ كان‎ (dīni l-m.) to belong to the Christian religion, be a Christian; ب‎ علم‎ على‎ كان‎ (‘ilmin) to be informed about. be acquainted with ...;انتظاره‎ على‎ كان‎ to wait for s. o. or s. th.; شيء‎ غير‎ على‎ for no reason; الأمر‎ من‎ بصيرة‎ على‎ in cognizance of the matter, knowing the matter; ب‎ علم‎ معرفة‎ غير‎ على‎ منه‎ (ma‘rifatin) without his knowing about it, without his knowledge, unwittingly; ه ھـ )‎or) ب‎ عليك‎ take ...! help yourself to ...! make use of ...! بالصبر‎ عليك‎ (bi-ṣ-ṣabr) you must have patience!به‎ علينا‎ he is the one we must have! به‎ علي‎ (‘alayya) bring, give him (or it) to me! I must have him (or it)! ان‎ عليه‎ it is incumbent on him to …; it’s his duty to ...; he must …, he will have to ...; عليك‎ لا‎ don’t worry! عليه‎ لا‎ never mind! It’s nothing! no harm done! (indicating forgiveness, indulgence); ماعلينا‎ what of it! what does it matter! let’s forget it! من‎ عليك‎ ما‎ don’t worry about ..., don’t mind …’ don’t give … a thought; ان‎ عليه‎ ما‎ he doesn’t care if ; it’s of little importance to him that …; حسابه‎ على‎ (ḥisābihī) at his expense;دين‎ عليه‎ (dain) he is in debt(s); قوي‎ سنه‎ على‎ ھو‎ (sinnihī qawīy) he bears his years well; علام‎ ‘alāma wherefore? what for? why?الاذان‎ علي‎ استيقظ‎ istaiqaẓa ‘alā l- aḏān he awoke over the call to prayer, he was awakened by the azan;ما‎ لسانه‎ على‎ قيل‎ (qīla, lisānihī) he was supposed to have said things which …, statements were ascribed to him which ...; يده‎ على‎ (yadihī) through him, by him, at his hand;ذلك‎ على‎ in this manner, thus; accordingly, hence; يقال‎ ما‎ على‎ (yuqālu) as they say, as it is said;حسب‎ على‎ ‘alā ḥasabi (prep.) according to, in accordance with, commensurate with, depending on; على‎ منھا‎ طوع‎ (‘alā) with her obeying, without opposition on her part;عادته‎ على‎ according to his habit, as was his wont, as he used to do; يقال‎ ما‎ على‎ (yuqālu) suddenly, all of a sudden, unawares, unexpectedly;عھد‎ على‎ (‘ahdi) at the time of
